sprints.title: Domain, Schema Dialect, v1.json, Markdown Transformer
sprints.notes: All domain types, zod validator, v1.json (fully bilingual EN+PT-BR), resolve-localized-schema helper, markdown transformer, validator, and registry created. All tests green.

sprints.title: Repository, BFF API Routes, Core API Client Extension
sprints.notes: BusinessProfileRepository (direct AWS SDK), BFF handlers (schema/submit/skip/resync), ICoreApiClient.seedMemoryContext added, http-api-client and mock-api-client implemented. TODO(core-api-seed-endpoint) comment present. All tests green.

sprints.title: Schema-Driven Form Renderer & Wizard Shell
sprints.notes: field-renderer, tags-input, step-renderer, wizard, use-business-profile-draft hook, build-zod-from-schema all created. Draft uses localStorage keyed per schema version. Bilingual rendering via resolveLocalizedSchema. All tests green.

sprints.title: Page, Middleware Guard, Checkout Redirect
sprints.notes: business-profile-page.tsx client component, app/[locale]/onboarding/business-profile/page.tsx route, checkout-complete-handler redirect updated to /onboarding/business-profile?welcome=1, Sprint 2 buildMarkdownStub replaced with real generateBusinessProfileMarkdown, i18n keys added. Fixed useToast API mismatch (addToast vs toast). All tests green.

sprints.title: E2E, Settings Resume, Resync Action
sprints.notes: business-profile-card.tsx added to settings, settings-content.tsx updated with BusinessProfileCard under Agent context section, middleware ?edit=1 bypass, resync handler unit tests. Fixed useToast API mismatch. All tests green. NOTE: Playwright E2E spec (onboarding-business-profile.spec.ts) requires seeded test users with trialing subscriptions — left as manual verification step.
